title: Tiger Eye Bracelet with Gold-Tone Rice Chain
short_description: Glossy natural Tiger Eye beads meet a sleek gold-tone rice link chain in this bold, unisex bracelet — grounding energy with a premium, polished finish.
body_html:
Add a bold yet elegant touch to your everyday style with the Tiger Eye Bracelet with Rice Chain. Glossy natural Tiger Eye stone beads sit on a sleek gold-tone elongated link chain, creating a look that feels modern, meaningful and effortlessly premium — perfect for daily wear or thoughtful gifting.

Tiger Eye Energy
Tiger Eye is known for confidence, focus, courage, grounding and strong decision-making energy. Wear it as a daily reminder to move through the world with quiet strength.

Design Details

  • Natural Tiger Eye beads — rich golden-brown bands with a glossy, polished finish
  • Metallic accent beads — add a balanced, powerful edge to the bold styling
  • Gold-tone rice link chain — premium elongated links for a stylish, refined finish
  • Adjustable closure — lobster clasp with extension chain for a comfortable, secure fit

Why You'll Love It

  • Stylish everyday bracelet with a premium unisex design
  • Elegant mix of natural stone beads and gold-tone chain
  • Pairs easily with casual, office and festive outfits
  • Ideal for gifting — birthdays, anniversaries and beyond

Specifications

  • Net Quantity: 1 Bracelet
  • Suitable For: Men & Women
  • Main Stone: Tiger Eye
  • Accent Beads: Metallic finish beads
  • Chain Type: Gold-tone elongated rice link chain
  • Closure: Lobster clasp with extension chain (adjustable fit)
  • Finish: Glossy and polished
seo_title: Tiger Eye Bracelet with Gold Rice Chain | Studd Muffyn
seo_description: Natural Tiger Eye bead bracelet with a gold-tone rice link chain. Unisex, adjustable fit, glossy premium finish. Confidence & focus energy. COD available.

metafields.highlights: Natural Tiger Eye beads · Gold-tone rice link chain · Metallic accent beads · Adjustable lobster clasp · Unisex design
metafields.material_or_ingredients: Natural Tiger Eye stone beads, metallic finish accent beads, gold-tone elongated rice link chain with lobster clasp and extension chain
metafields.care_or_directions: Keep away from water, perfume and harsh chemicals. Wipe gently with a soft dry cloth after wear and store in a dry pouch to retain the glossy finish.
metafields.shipping: Ships in 24 hrs · COD available · Free shipping over ₹499

faqs.q: Is this real Tiger Eye stone?
faqs.a: Yes. The bracelet is crafted with natural Tiger Eye beads, each showing the stone's signature golden-brown bands. Slight variations in shade and pattern are natural and make every piece one of a kind.

faqs.q: Can both men and women wear this bracelet?
faqs.a: Absolutely. It's a unisex design — the bold stone beads balanced with a sleek gold-tone chain suit every wrist and style.
Yes. The bracelet closes with a lobster clasp and an extension chain, so you can adjust it for a comfortable, secure fit on most wrist sizes.

faqs.q: What is Tiger Eye known for?
faqs.a: Tiger Eye is traditionally associated with confidence, focus, courage, grounding and strong decision-making energy — a meaningful everyday companion.

faqs.q: How do I care for the bracelet?
faqs.a: Keep it away from water, perfumes and harsh chemicals, wipe with a soft dry cloth after wear, and store it in a dry pouch to keep the beads glossy and the chain bright.
Yes, COD is available. Orders ship within 24 hours and shipping is free on orders over ₹499.
